title: CBC: Nuclear
description: Small integration mod for Create Big Cannons and Alex's Caves.
body:
After 5,235,423,464\[1\] requests for nuclear warfare in Create Big Cannons, it has finally arrived in the form of this addon.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-AAvlDMGiLA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(Thanks to BlackeagleYT for the awesome video!)

This mod adds one thing: The Nuclear Shell. Functions exactly\* like the Nuclear Bomb from Alex's Caves, but in shell form! Perfect for deleting people's bases from hundreds of blocks away!

\----------------------------------------------

\[1\] - Source for this statistic:

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_42bda6e5-ae53-4616-99d4-649f820ed571.png)

\* - Unlike the Nuclear Bomb from Alex's Caves, the Nuclear Shell cannot be ridden. However, it can still be defused with shears, and will activate nearby Nuclear Sirens.
